case_title: INTERNATIONAL AUTO REPAIR VS TANG, VIVIAN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL AUTO REPAIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TANG, VIVIAN JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 11/24/92 IS VACATED, SERVICE BY MAIL IS INVALID PER REFEREE GEORGE COLBERT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,738.65 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL AUTO REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, VIVIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
CERT. RECEIPT TO ZOUHEIR ARNAOUT RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL AUTO REPAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANG, VIVIAN $1,538.65 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,551.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
